message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam roundcorner 12
skinparam class {
  BackgroundColor #F7F7F7
  BorderColor #333333
  ArrowColor #333333
  HeaderBackgroundColor #F7F7F7
}
hide empty members

class App {
  +main()
  +start()
}

class FileHandler {
  +promptFile(): String
  +writeListToFile(): void
  +readListFromFile(): ArrayList<String>
}

class item {
  -LocalDate dueDate
  -String desc
  +getDesc()
  +getDate()
  +setDesc()
  +setDate()
}

class HomeScreenController {
  -ObservableList<OL> Lists
  +viewListsClicked()
  +listClicked(nameOfList,mode)
  +addBlankListClicked()
  +addExistingListClicked()
  +editListClicked()
  +saveAllListsClicked()
  +confirmDeleteClicked()
}

class ListScreenController {
  -ObservableList currentList
  +filterBoxChanged()
  +saveToStorage()
  +addNewItemClicked()
  +deleteSelectedClicked()
  +completeBoxChanged(item)
  +itemDescChanged(item)
  +itemDueDateChanged(item)
  +itemSelected(item)
}

App o-- HomeScreenController
App o-- ListScreenController

FileHandler o-- HomeScreenController
FileHandler o-- ListScreenController

HomeScreenController o-- item
ListScreenController o-- item
@enduml
